parameters.name: fitmethod
parameters.label: Fit to Nearest Cycle
parameters.description: When on the captured gesture will be extended or trimmed to be a multiple of the Beats Per Cycle.

parameters.name: numbeats
parameters.label: Beats per Cycle
parameters.description: Specifies the number of beats to cycle the recorded animation around. If the recorded animation is longer than a multiple of the Beats Per Cycle, it will loop at that multiplied length.

parameters.name: step
parameters.label: Step Output
parameters.description: If on, the cycled animation will adjust up or down each iteration to avoid jumps when looping to the beginning.  For example, it would turn a simple 0-1 ramp gesture into a continuously increasing lin

parameters.name: stepreset
parameters.label: Step Reset
parameters.description: When On and you re-record a gesture, the step will be zeroed.

parameters.name: blend
parameters.label: Blend Time
parameters.description: How much of the recorded segment to use as a blend region. The blend region is used to blend the beginning of the segment to the end so that a seemless loop is produced.

parameters.name: interp
parameters.label: Interpolate Samples
parameters.description: If on, recorded samples are interpolated when scaling occurs, otherwise the nearest sample is selected.

parameters.name: speed
parameters.label: Speed
parameters.description: Scales the rate of playback for the segment.

parameters.name: resetcondition
parameters.label: Reset Condition
parameters.description: This menu determines how the Reset input (the third input) triggers a reset of the channel(s).

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: Resets the gesture while On when in .

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
